params.name: Gilded Buddha
params.source:
Wishmaking Event (06/07 - 06/13)
Lottery Machine No.1 (0.09%)
Alchemy Furnace (0.06%)
Grandmaster Scrolls (0.75%)
params.description:
On Apr 6, 1974 AD, Gilded Buddha was unearthed in Bali Village of Xi'an suburb.<br
<Gilded Buddha is a collection of statues on a square bed: the Amitbha Buddha Statue, a Bodhisattva and a Nryana on the sides, a naked midget holding a censer, and a pair of crouching lions. In total, it has 23 detachable components and is a signature buddha statue of the Sui dynasty. The vows and praises inscribed on the bed convey the story of the statue's origins and how widespread Buddhist culture was at the p …
